Packet module__pl330_target__workflow_todo_01 draft RTL update. The owner RTL remains a non-placeholder top-level implementation. This update preserves prior slice logic and patches two workflow-sensitive areas: FM_DMASEV now compares an extended event index against NUM_IRQS instead of truncating 16 to 4'h0, and pipeline stage data advances only with the matching valid stage so request/response timing evidence follows the cycle_model handshake and pipeline rules. PASS/signoff remains blocked by global locked-truth gates outside this packet.
